name: Chicken Tortellini Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, melt butter.
2. Add carrots; sauté for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add chicken and cook for 5 minutes until the chicken is done.
4. Add celery and onions; cook for 4-5 minutes.
5. Dissolve bouillon cubes in water; add to soup with remaining ingredients except tortellini.
6. Simmer until all vegetables are tender.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Add tortellini.
